name: @bpmn-react/library
description: Generic, ecosystem-independent artifact catalog for BuildToValue Studio (Handoff 6 S-1): the ArtifactAdapter contract plus headless search/filter/sort/count logic. Knows nothing about BPMN, DMN or any concrete artifact type — adapters plug in. Workspace-only — the publish scope awaits pendencias.md §1. Zero dependencies, including @bpmn-react/*.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs dist/cjs
